title: Chandni Chowk
writer: D.P. Berry, I.S. Johar, Kamil Rashid
plot: Nawab Safdarjung( Kumar ) lives in Delhi with his family and is a very fun loving person. She has a daughter Zarina ( Meena Kumari ) who is of marriageable age. While there are other candidates to hold her hand, the Nawab decides ...
